title: VALTOM and Waga Energy Inaugurate First RNG Production Unit Using a Hybrid Biogas Source
content: Laurent Battut, president of VALTOM, and Nicolas Paget, executive vice-president of Waga Energy, inaugurate on Tuesday, May 13th, 2025 in Clermont-Ferrand (center of France), in the presence of JoÃ«l Mathurin, Prefect of Puy-de-DÃ´me, and representatives of Clermont Auvergne MÃ©tropole, a Renewable natural gas production unit fuelled by biogas from the Puy-Long landfill, and from the methanization unit of the VernÃ©a cluster. Commissioned in Clermont-Ferrand on December 18th, 2024, this first European Renewable natural gas (RNG) production unit fuelled by a hybrid biogas source is the result of cooperation between VALTOM, the public authority in charge of household waste recovery and treatment in the Puy-deDÃ´me and northern Haute-Loire regions, in the center of France, and Waga Energy, a specialist in RNG production on landfill sites.
author: Analysts Account
